caption: The video features a presentation on a rural community food system, focusing on the concept of "Changing Mental Models." The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking to the audience. The main content displayed is a complex diagram with various interconnected elements, such as "Public Awareness," "Community Health," "Ecological Health Considerations," and "Desire for Local Sustainable Food." The diagram highlights different aspects of the food system, including societal needs, community-based social relationships, and ecological considerations. The presenter appears to be navigating through the diagram, specifically highlighting the section labeled "Introduction" under "Changing Mental Models." This suggests that the video aims to educate viewers on how altering mental models can impact the overall health and sustainability of a rural community's food system.
